fields.explainZh: 在虚拟机的网络配置中作为唯一标识符，用于将客户机操作系统中的网络接口（NIC）与虚拟机的虚拟硬件配置相对应，如果为-1，则表示当前虚拟机网卡此值为缺省值-1。
fields.explainEn: In the network configuration of a virtual machine, it serves as a unique identifier to correspond the network interface (NIC) in the guest operating system with the virtual hardware configuration of the virtual machine. If the value is -1, it indicates that the current virtual machines network card has the default value of -1.
